active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The active finish-board row is still drmTMB#59 numerical-guard sensitivity. The ordinary q2 correlation-grid, structured q2 boundary, scale-side phylogenetic clamp-active, fixed-effect bivariate sigma1/sigma2 clamp-sensitivity, Student-t Wald calibration, Student-t profile/bootstrap feasibility, Student-t profile/bootstrap diagnostic pilot, and Student-t profile/bootstrap calibration diagnostic are banked as diagnostic evidence only. The new calibration diagnostic has 100 fixed-effect Student-t shape fits, minimum convergence 0.88, minimum pdHess 0.86, profile ok rates of 0.38-0.54, all requested parametric-bootstrap intervals returning with 50 refits, rough 70% profile coverage of 0.5185185-0.8095238, and rough 70% bootstrap coverage of 0.50-0.68. Larger bivariate scale-route grids, larger guard grids, promotion-grade Student-t profile/bootstrap evidence, additional random-effect and structured correlation guard depth, larger scale-side grids, and broader intervals remain planned.
